title: Developer Needed
excerpt:
I am looking for a developer that can connect Monday.com to Tripleseat. 
Seems possible but wouldn’t know how to do that. 
Happy to pay for this service.

posts.author: ToastCatering (Melissa)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am looking for a developer that can connect Monday.com to Tripleseat.
Seems possible but wouldn’t know how to do that.

Happy to pay for this service.

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ToastCatering ,

Let us connect at some point to discuss the exact requirements of yours, Happy to help you out.

I had already integrated various external applications with monday.

I hope the app you are trying to integrate with monday is already exposing it’s api?

You can reach out to me at aquibcs@outlook.com .

Regards,
Aquib Zafar

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @ToastCatering , Melissa,

Happy to have a chat to discover the full set of requirements. We build lot’s of integration apps for monday, see Downloads Archive - Excellent Team

Let me know if you are interested in having a video call.

posts.author: dvdbosch (Derek)
posts.cookedHtml: Has anyone successfully done the integration between monday and tripleseat?
